  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  - New port p5-SVN-Notify-Filter-Markdown-0.01
  
  This Perl module converts SVN::Notify log messages from Markdown
  format to HTML.
  
  PR:             ports/122987
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin at sourcehosting.net> (maintainer)
